long_description:
[RNOS]-RNOS ActiveRouteDistinguisherAvailablePercent is at or below 10% [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/rt_rd_alert.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed Low Route Distinguisher available issue in is-rnos-rt-rd
TIP Short Description:              RNOS ActiveRouteDistinguisherAvailablePercent is at or below 10% rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:staging:public:is-network-ips:us-south::rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod:microservice:

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-2
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name, kube_deployment_name)((avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_available{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m])/(avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_available{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_used{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_retired{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]))*100) / 3) <= 10 = 10.00
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod' and kube_deployment_name = 'regional-network-mock'

Time:                12/02/2025 12:59 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [RNOS]-RNOS ActiveRouteDistinguisherAvailablePercent is at or below 10% [US-SOUTH-STAGE]
Description:    RNOS ActiveRouteDistinguisherAvailablePercent is at or below 10% rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod
Team:           is-network-ips
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum by (kube_cluster_name, kube_deployment_name)((avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_available{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m])/(avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_available{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_used{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_route_distinguisher_retired{kube_deployment_name="regional-network-mock"}[10m]))*100) / 3) <= 10
